---
title: "Játékos profilok"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)

# ── DB: játékos info lookup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "bball_10_tables.db")
player_info_db <- dbGetQuery(con,
  "SELECT Játékos, Csapat AS klub, Poszt FROM player_info"
)
dbDisconnect(con)

player_info_db <- player_info_db[!duplicated(player_info_db$Játékos), ]

get_db_info <- function(nev) {
  row <- player_info_db[player_info_db$Játékos == nev, ]
  if (nrow(row) == 0) return(list(klub = NULL, pozicio = NULL))
  list(
    klub    = if (!is.na(row$klub[1]))  row$klub[1] else NULL,
    pozicio = if (!is.na(row$Poszt[1])) row$Poszt[1] else NULL
  )
}

# ── Rating helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

rating_cfg <- function(r) {
  switch(tolower(as.character(r)),
    "strong-buy"  = list(bg = "#1a7a4a", label = "Strong Buy"),
    "buy"         = list(bg = "#4caf50", label = "Buy"),
    "hold"        = list(bg = "#7A756D", label = "Hold"),
    "sell"        = list(bg = "#e57373", label = "Sell"),
    "strong-sell" = list(bg = "#C43A28", label = "Strong Sell"),
    list(bg = "#7A756D", label = as.character(r))
  )
}

# ── Read YAML frontmatter from .qmd files ────────────────────────────────────

read_profile_meta <- function(filepath) {
  lines <- readLines(filepath, encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE)
  delims <- which(lines == "---")
  if (length(delims) < 2) return(NULL)
  yaml_text <- paste(lines[(delims[1] + 1):(delims[2] - 1)], collapse = "\n")
  meta <- tryCatch(yaml::yaml.load(yaml_text), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(meta) || is.null(meta$profile)) return(NULL)
  meta$filename <- basename(filepath)
  meta
}

player_files <- list.files(
  "jatekosok",
  pattern    = "\\.qmd$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
player_files <- player_files[!grepl("^_", basename(player_files))]

profiles <- Filter(Negate(is.null), lapply(player_files, read_profile_meta))

# ── Render list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if (length(profiles) == 0) {

  tags$p(
    style = "color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2rem;",
    "M\u00e9g nincs j\u00e1t\u00e9kos profil."
  )

} else {

  # Sort: strong-buy first, then by name
  rating_order <- c("strong-buy" = 1, "buy" = 2, "hold" = 3,
                    "sell" = 4, "strong-sell" = 5)
  profiles <- profiles[order(
    rating_order[tolower(sapply(profiles, function(m) m$profile$besorolas))],
    sapply(profiles, function(m) m$profile$nev)
  )]

  cards <- lapply(profiles, function(meta) {
    p           <- meta$profile
    db_info     <- get_db_info(p$nev)
    klub        <- if (!is.null(db_info$klub))    db_info$klub    else p$klub
    pozicio     <- if (!is.null(db_info$pozicio)) db_info$pozicio else p$pozicio
    profile_url <- sub("\\.qmd$", ".html", paste0("jatekosok/", meta$filename))
    sport_label <- if (tolower(p$sport) == "basketball") "Kos\u00e1rlabda" else "Labdar\u00fcg\u00e1s"
    cfg         <- rating_cfg(p$besorolas)

    tags$a(
      href  = profile_url,
      class = "pp-list-card-link",
      tags$div(
        class = "pp-list-card",
        style = paste0("border-left:4px solid ", cfg$bg, ";"),
        tags$div(
          class = "pp-list-card-top",
          tags$span(class = "pp-list-name", p$nev),
          tags$span(
            class = "pp-rating-badge",
            style = paste0("background:", cfg$bg, ";"),
            cfg$label
          )
        ),
        tags$div(
          class = "pp-list-card-meta",
          tags$span(class = "pp-badge pp-badge-small", sport_label),
          if (!is.null(klub))    tags$span(class = "pp-badge pp-badge-small", klub),
          if (!is.null(pozicio)) tags$span(class = "pp-badge pp-badge-small", pozicio)
        ),
        tags$div(class = "pp-list-tezis", p$tezis)
      )
    )
  })

  tags$div(class = "pp-list-grid", cards)
}
```
